description: Log in as admin (admin / Admin1234!). Register a new external LTI tool named 'CodePractice Pro' at the site level using Tool URL 'https://codepractice.example.com/lti/launch', Consumer key 'moodle-cs101-2024', and Shared secret 'secretkey2024abc'. In the 'Introduction to Programming' (CS101) course, add an External tool activity named 'Week 3: Python Loops Practice' using the 'CodePractice Pro' preconfigured tool.
